endpoints.name: Get preview image of uploaded file
endpoints.description: This GET-Method returns the URL where the preview image of uploaded file can downloaded from.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LOGORAISR_API_KEY}} with your LOGORAISR API KEY. Replace {{FILE_ID}} with a real file_id.

endpoints.name: Get process list.
endpoints.description: This GET-Method lists all on logoraisr available processes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LOGORAISR_API_KEY}} with your LOGORAISR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get user project list.
endpoints.description: This GET-Method lists the user's projects.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LOGORAISR_API_KEY}} with your LOGORAISR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a new project.
endpoints.description: This POST-Method creates a new project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LOGORAISR_API_KEY}} with your LOGORAISR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get project details.
endpoints.description: This GET-Method returns a specific project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LOGORAISR_API_KEY}} with your LOGORAISR API KEY. Replace {{PROJECT_NUMBER}} with a real project_number.

endpoints.name: Get user report list.
endpoints.description: This GET method lists the user's reports.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LOGORAISR_API_KEY}} with your LOGORAISR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Create a new report.
endpoints.description: This POST-Method creates a new report.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LOGORAISR_API_KEY}} with your LOGORAISR API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get report details.
endpoints.description: This GET-Method returns the details of a specific report.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LOGORAISR_API_KEY}} with your LOGORAISR API KEY. Replace {{REPORT_NUMBER}} with a real report_number.

endpoints.name: Get the result from image processing
endpoints.description: This GET-Method returns the URL where the result can downloaded from.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LOGORAISR_API_KEY}} with your LOGORAISR API KEY. Replace {{RESULT_FILE_ID}} with a real result_file_id.

endpoints.name: Upload a new image
endpoints.description: This POST-Method uploads a new file on the server.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{LOGORAISR_API_KEY}} with your LOGORAISR API KEY.
